{ "name": "levn", "version": "0.4.1", "author": "George Zahariev <z@georgezahariev.com>", "description": "Light ECMAScript (JavaScript) Value Notation - human written, concise, typed, flexible", "homepage": "https://github.com/gkz/levn", "keywords": [ "levn", "light", "ecmascript", "value", "notation", "json", "typed", "human", "concise", "typed", "flexible" ], "files": [ "lib", "README.md", "LICENSE" ], "main": "./lib/", "bugs": "https://github.com/gkz/levn/issues", "license": "MIT", "engines": { "node": ">= 0.8.0" }, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git://github.com/gkz/levn.git" }, "scripts": { "test": "make test" }, "dependencies": { "prelude-ls": "^1.2.1", "type-check": "~0.4.0" }, "devDependencies": { "livescript": "^1.6.0", "mocha": "^7.1.1" } }
